_about: Small-prop library (Prop Library 0.9). Motion-use desk items keyed by Director PropId (cup/phone/controller/book/headphones/snack_plate; see src/lib/motion/director/types.ts). Each entry loads as a normal SceneProp at its desk REST position (bottom sitting on the desk top y=0.73, horizontally centered on its `anchor` slot, scale baked to real-world size). `anchor` (desk_left/center/right) is the semantic rest slot the Motion Director 0.9 will use. INF-4(2026-06-13): hand/head attach mechanism is implemented (src/lib/scene/propAttach.ts; Lab __motionLab.attachProp/detachProp); per-item `attach.hand_r/hand_l/head` carries the bone-local grip offset. cup.attach.hand_r is PROVISIONAL (mechanism-verified at scale 1, follows the hand, returns to rest) — finalize the exact drink grip when authoring amb_work_sip. Per-item visibility persists in localStorage (props.itemSelection.v1). Every entry's license is also in ASSET_CREDITS.md.

items.label: マグカップ
items._anchorNote: Canonical (Stage 2/5, issue #6/#7/#8/#14): cup rests on the character's RIGHT side (world -x; she faces +Z so her right hand is at world -x), at a position the right hand actually REACHES (measured ~[-0.25,0.79,0.17] at desk height). The far -0.52 spot was beyond arm reach, which caused the old attach to teleport the cup. amb_work_sip grabs it here with the right hand.
